storyBank.one_liner: Built a partner-integration platform from zero to 40 enterprise partners

storyBank.name: Data Compliance Program
storyBank.one_liner: Delivered privacy-compliance readiness across 5 product lines
storyBank.metrics: 5 product lines, audit passed first attempt

rules: Currently employed — never describe as 'ex-' the current company.
Only claim facts present in this profile; never invent metrics or titles.
Never flag location as a gap for roles in the candidate's country.
Flag any role where stated compensation is below the expected CTC minimum.
Scam screen every JD: generic/free email domains for senior roles, chat-app-first recruitment, any fee or deposit request, role missing from the company careers page.

formats.coverLetter: Compact India format: sender details, date, 'Dear Hiring Team,', 2-3 short paragraphs, 3-5 bullet highlights, closing. Plain text.
formats.recruiterDm: Under 300 characters: one specific hook from the JD, one credibility point, one clear ask.
